key_drivers: Real yields falling sharply (DFII10 at 1.99%), providing a powerful bullish driver for gold and equities
BoJ and ECB hawkish pivots driving FX divergence from the Fed's neutral hold, strengthening EUR and JPY
Risk-off environment (VIX 24+) supporting safe havens while creating headwinds for equities despite yield support
Trade war escalation (US-China tariffs) and GDPNow at 1.6% raising growth slowdown concerns

fallbacks_used: Investing.com blocked, used MarketWatch/TradingEconomics for copper
